description: Style NoteThis simply styled dress from w is just right for Summer '12. It goes easy on the prints (perfect for when you want a change from the tribal prints we've seen so much of) and styles its silhouette simply without fussy design details. Pair this with either a blingy pair of leggings for an over-the-top ethnic look (the minimalistic dress will balance out the loud leggings) or simply style it with monochrome ones for a sunny day out.Product DetailsRed round neck dress, has a half buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves, double lip buttoned welt pocket on the left chest, loops at the sides and a fabric belt at the midriffMaterial and Care100% cottonWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
